bounties.title: Send It
bounties.description: Send a boulder at or above your project grade.

bounties.title: Outdoor Send
bounties.description: Send a problem outside.

bounties.title: Flash Dance
bounties.description: Flash a climb that intimidated you.

bounties.title: Slabmaster
bounties.description: Send a slab — everyone's nemesis.

bounties.title: Marathon Session
bounties.description: Climb for 2+ hours in one session.

bounties.title: Anti-Style
bounties.description: Send something in your weakest style.

bounties.title: Volume Day
bounties.description: Send 15+ problems in one session, any grade.

bounties.title: Down Climber
bounties.description: Down-climb 5 problems instead of dropping off.

bounties.title: Blind Onsight
bounties.description: Send a problem first try without watching anyone else on it.

bounties.title: No Excuses
bounties.description: Session on a day you really didn't feel like going.

bounties.title: Beta Breaker
bounties.description: Send using different beta than everyone else uses.

bounties.title: Circuit Breaker
bounties.description: Climb every problem of a single grade in one area of the gym.

bounties.title: Century Club
bounties.description: 100 total pull-ups in a day.

bounties.title: Hangboard Hero
bounties.description: Complete a full fingerboard or hangboard session.

bounties.title: Cardio Engine
bounties.description: 30+ minutes of running, biking, or swimming.

bounties.title: Core Crusher
bounties.description: 15+ minutes of dedicated core work.

bounties.title: Antagonist Day
bounties.description: Push workout — dips, presses, or push-ups.

bounties.title: Lockdown
bounties.description: Hold a lock-off at 90° for 15+ seconds per arm.

bounties.title: Legs Exist
bounties.description: 20+ minutes of leg work — squats, lunges, or pistols.

bounties.title: Grip Reaper
bounties.description: Dead hang for 90 cumulative seconds on small edges.

bounties.title: Weighted Wonder
bounties.description: Complete a weighted pull-up session.

bounties.title: Trail Beast
bounties.description: Hike 3+ miles with elevation — Bishop training!

bounties.title: Prehab Pro
bounties.description: Complete a shoulder and finger prehab routine.

bounties.title: Bendy
bounties.description: 20+ minutes of full mobility or stretching.

bounties.title: Early Bird
bounties.description: Get a session in before 8am.

bounties.title: Hip Hip Hooray
bounties.description: 15+ minutes of hip-opener work — high steps need it.

bounties.title: Night Owl
bounties.description: Full stretch routine after 9pm to wind down.

bounties.title: Splits Curious
bounties.description: Work toward a split or deep frog pose for 15+ minutes.

bounties.title: Roll Model
bounties.description: 15+ minutes of foam rolling or massage-ball work.

bounties.title: Zen Sender
bounties.description: 10+ minutes of breathing or meditation before bed.
